raw_consumer_statement: The thing I regret the most is handling Citibank business. This company has a very poor reputation. The company is in chaos and the system information is out of sync. When I applied for a credit card half a year ago, the credit card was stolen before I even got it. I went to the store to provide feedback, but they didn't handle it and asked me to call myself. So I spent a day queuing up to make an appointment and got through the phone. They informed me that more than XXXX XXXX dollars had been stolen and I had reported it a total of 3 times until now. They haven't refunded my money for nearly XXXX  months. Because of this, the credit card with a limit of XXXX has been highly used for half a year, resulting in a credit score of more than XXXX. They have never processed it for half a year. It's ridiculous. No, it's not a formal company at all.
